# Home-Lab Infrastructure-as-Data Project

> Entry point: CLAUDE.md | Full rules: docs/ai/AGENT-RULEBOOK.md

## Architecture
- Source of truth: topology/topology.yaml
- Pattern: Class → Object → Instance
- Generated outputs: generated/ (DO NOT EDIT)

## Specifications
- ADR Register: adr/REGISTER.md (118 decisions)
- Rule Map: docs/ai/ADR-RULE-MAP.yaml
- Capabilities: topology/class-modules/capability-catalog.yaml

## Commands
- Compile: .venv/bin/python topology-tools/compile-topology.py
- Test: python -m pytest tests -q
- Validate: task ci:local
